title: Central Province (Rating of Land) Amendment Ordinance 2016 (LN No. 78 of 2016)
text:
273
SUPPLEMENT
to the Solomon Islands Gazette
Monday, 19th December, 2016 S.I. No. 52
[Legal Notice No. 78]
THE PROVINCIAL GOVERNMENT ACT 1997
(NO. 7 of 1997)
THE CENTRAL PROVINCE (RATING OF LAND)
AMENDMENT ORDINANCE 2016
An Amendment Ordinance Pursuant to section 30 of the Provincial
Government Act 1997 (No. 7 of 1997) to Amend Schedule A of the
Central Province (Rating of Land) Ordinance 1994. Enacted by the
Central Provincial Assembly.
1. This Ordinance may be cited as the Central Province (Rating of
Land) Amendment Ordinance 2016 and shall come into effect
upon approval by the Minister and published in the Government
Gazette.
2. Schedule A of the Central Province (Rating of Land) Ordinance
1994 is amended by deleting Schedule A of the 1994 Ordinance
and inserting the following new Schedule A:
Schedule A
(Pursuant to Section 15(1) of the Central Province
(Rating of Land) Ordinance 1994)
ZONE OF RATEABLE LAND INCLUDING PER CENTUM
TO ASSESS ON UNIMPROVED VALUE OF LAND
Per Centum [%] of
Rateable Land Zone
Unimproved Value of Land
Residential 0.35%
Commercial 1.00%
Agricultural 1.00%
Industrial 2.50%
Mixed Development Land Use 1.20%
Passed by the Central Provincial Assembly this twenty-seventh day of
October, 2016.
MATHEw SALE
Clerk to the Assembly

274
Assented to this twenty-seventh day of October, 2016
HON. DAVID TOME
Minister for Provincial Government
Honiara, Solomon Islands
Printed under the authority of the
Solomon Islands Government
Printed by Pacific Printers Limited
